task_description: Bootstrap the cdk-sleep-csharp-kiro repository with xUnit + CDK Assertions test infrastructure, TDD-first tests, CI workflow, and architecture documentation for the sleep audio pipeline.

verification.summary: dotnet build succeeds (0 warnings, 0 errors). dotnet test passes (2 passing, 1 skipped TDD placeholder). cdk synth produces valid CloudFormation template. Tests exercise the CDK synthesis path and would fail if stack constructor were broken.
